languages.text: {n}Спустя несколько долгих секунд вам отвечает нечеловечески мелодичный голос.{/n} "Не приближайтесь, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Мы не позволим вам встать на пути наших поисков. Древний враг дремлет, но мы найдем его и свершим свою месть. Отступите или мы вынуждены будем напасть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Спустя несколько долгих секунд вам отвечает нечеловечески мелодичный голос.{/n} "Не приближайтесь, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Вам должны скорее покинуть эту систему, пока пророчество о древнем зле не сбылось. Отступите или мы вынуждены будем напасть".

languages.text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя несколько долгих секунд вам отвечает нечеловечески мелодичный голос.{/n} "Не приближайтесь, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Мы не позволим вам встать на пути наших поисков. Древний враг дремлет, но мы найдем его и свершим свою месть. Отступите или мы вынуждены будем напасть".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You shall not stand in our way. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Retreat or we will be forced to attack."

{n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

{n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, mon-keigh. You must leave this system soon, before the prophecy of ancient evil comes true. Retreat or we will be forced to attack."

{n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You shall not stand in our way. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Retreat or we will be forced to attack."

{n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

languages.text: {n}数秒間、不気味なメロディーのような声が返ってくる。{/n}「近づくな、モンケィ。このシステムからすぐに去るがいい。古代の悪の予言が成り立つ前に。撤退するか、攻撃せざるをえなくなるぞ」
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, mon-keigh. You must leave this system soon, before the prophecy of ancient evil comes true. Retreat or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}数秒間、不気味なメロディーのような声が返ってくる。{n}「近づくな、モンケィ。このシステムからすぐに去るがいい。古代の悪の予言が成り立つ前に。撤退するか、攻撃せざるをえなくなるぞ。」

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de largos segundos, una voz melódica e inhumana te responde.{/n} «No te acerques más, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. No interfieras con nuestra búsqueda. El antiguo enemigo dormita, pero lo encontraremos para cobrarnos nuestra venganza. Retírate o nos veremos obligados a atacar».
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de largos segundos, una voz melódica e inhumana te responde.{/n} «No te acerques más, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. No interfieras con nuestra búsqueda. El antiguo enemigo dormita, pero lo encontraremos para cobrarnos nuestra venganza. Retírate o nos veremos obligados a atacar».

languages.text: {n}漫长的几秒后，一个非人的悦耳声音回应了你。{/n}“不得再靠近，{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}。你不得干扰我们的搜索。那古老的宿敌正在休眠，但我们定会找到他，报仇雪恨。立刻离开，否则我们只能被迫发起攻击。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}漫长的几秒后，一个非人的悦耳声音回应了你。{/n}“不得再靠近，{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}。你不得干扰我们的搜索。那古老的宿敌正在休眠，但我们定会找到他，报仇雪恨。立刻离开，否则我们只能被迫发起攻击。”

languages.text: {n}Nach einigen langen Sekunden antwortet dir eine unmenschliche melodische Stimme.{/n} "Kommt nicht näher, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}. Ihr dürft unsere Suche nicht stören. Der alte Feind schläft, aber wir werden ihn finden und uns rächen. Geht jetzt oder wir sind gezwungen, Euch anzugreifen."
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einigen langen Sekunden antwortet dir eine unmenschliche melodische Stimme.{/n} "Kommt nicht näher, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}. Ihr dürft unsere Suche nicht stören. Der alte Feind schläft, aber wir werden ihn finden und uns rächen. Geht jetzt oder wir sind gezwungen, Euch anzugreifen."

languages.text: {n}Birkaç ,saniyenin ardından insanüstü melodik bir ses sana cevap veriyor.{/n} "Daha fazla yaklaşma {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Arayışımıza müdahale etmemelisin. Kadim düşman uykuda ama onu bulacak ve intikamımızı alacağız. Hemen gitmezsen saldırmak zorunda kalırız."
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç ,saniyenin ardından insanüstü melodik bir ses sana cevap veriyor.{/n} "Daha fazla yaklaşma {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Arayışımıza müdahale etmemelisin. Kadim düşman uykuda ama onu bulacak ve intikamımızı alacağız. Hemen gitmezsen saldırmak zorunda kalırız."

languages.text: {n}Au bout de quelques secondes qui vous paraissent une éternité, une voix mélodieuse vous répond.{/n} « N'approchez plus, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Ne nous gênez pas dans nos recherches. L'ennemi ancien sommeille, mais nous le débusquerons et nous nous vengerons. Partez, ou nous n'aurons pas d'autre choix que de vous détruire. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."

traits.locale_text: {n}Au bout de quelques secondes qui vous paraissent une éternité, une voix mélodieuse vous répond.{/n} « N'approchez plus, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Ne nous gênez pas dans nos recherches. L'ennemi ancien sommeille, mais nous le débusquerons et nous nous vengerons. Partez, ou nous n'aurons pas d'autre choix que de vous détruire. »
